title: Login API returns 500 on invalid JWT
description: When an expired token is sent to /auth/login, server returns 500 instead of 401.

title: Issue list UI truncates long titles
description: Card component cuts off text without tooltip for titles above 60 characters.

title: CI pipeline flaky on migration step
description: Database migration step intermittently fails in staging workflow.

title: Reporter email validation allows spaces
description: Reporter creation accepts invalid emails containing spaces around @ symbol.
